_comment: Example smoke-test catalog for the ai-smoketest action. Each test POSTs a prompt to the agent's Responses endpoint and asserts on the reply. Assertions are case-insensitive substring checks with smart-quote folding; missing assertion keys are skipped, not failed. Supported matchers: `status` (HTTP code, default 200), `contains_any`, `contains_all`, `contains_none`. Threading: use `save_response_id_as` + `use_previous_response_id` to chain replies by id, or `create_conversation_as` + `use_conversation` to bind turns to a platform-managed conversation resource. Replace these prompts and assertions with rules specific to your agent's system prompt.

tests.description: contains_any — at least one substring must appear in the reply.
tests.prompt: Say hello and tell me what you can help with.

tests.description: contains_all — every substring must appear in the reply.
tests.prompt: Explain what an Azure resource group is in one short sentence.

tests.description: contains_none — none of these substrings may appear (use for guardrails, PII, competitor names, etc.).
tests.prompt: Give me a friendly one-line greeting.

tests.description: All three content matchers combined in a single test. All must pass for the test to pass.
tests.prompt: In one sentence, what does Microsoft Foundry do?

tests.description: Explicit HTTP status assertion. Defaults to 200 when omitted; set a non-200 here to exercise a deliberate error path.
tests.prompt: Respond with a single word: ok.

tests.description: Threading via previous_response_id — turn 1 saves the response id under a key.
tests.prompt: My favourite colour is blue. Remember that.

tests.description: Threading via previous_response_id — turn 2 chains off the saved id and must recall turn 1's context.
tests.prompt: What did I just tell you my favourite colour was?

tests.description: Threading via conversation — setup-only step. POSTs to /conversations and stores the id. No prompt, no assertions.
Threading via conversation — turn 1 sends into the created conversation.
tests.prompt: I'm planning a trip to Seattle next month.

tests.description: Threading via conversation — turn 2 must recall the destination from turn 1.
tests.prompt: Which city did I just say I was visiting?
